# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      t1 = CMP_GT x_1, 0
      JUMP_IF_NOT t1, L2
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      RETURN
  L2:
      JUMP L3
  L3:
      t2 = CMP_LT x_1, 0
      JUMP_IF_NOT t2, L5
      JUMP L4
  L4:
      t3 = NEG 1
      RETURN t3
  L5:
      JUMP L6
  L6:
      RETURN

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t4 = CALL test, 5
      RETURN t4
